title: ヴィクトリアマイルの後に・先輩

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess manages to produce a great
result in the Victoria Mile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm waiting in the runner's tunnel for her to
return...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami looked like she had fun. I noticed it
during the race, too.
choice_data_list: She was running like herself again.
She was running like herself again.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's to be expected. She did get a push in
the right direction from yours truly!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, a push! What's there to doubt? Have you
not been paying attention?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I totally called Kawakami out on her
shortcomings!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's my role as the more seasoned racer! I made
my debut before her, you know?
choice_data_list: So you were worried about her.
So you were worried about her.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! What's wrong with you?! You should be
showing me much more gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Start with a "thank you" at least! Then you can
treat me to a delicious juice!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh my—Trainer! And Sweep's here, too.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ I'm actually on my way out! Don't forget
you owe me thanks as well, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My... Sweep looked much more cheerful than
usual!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it doesn't really surprise me, though.
Today's race was...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Really fun, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After the concert, we return to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, would you stay with me for a little
longer tonight?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's nothing. I just...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Come on! This way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess immediately dashes off,
leaving me to chase after her into the school
building.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wooow! The stars are so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
We're so high up. It's scary to even think about
what would happen if I fell.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I knooow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami has led me out onto the school's roof. I
check the time—the school building will be
closing soon.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. The first three years an Umamusume
and her trainer spend together are really
important, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first three years... If an Umamusume hasn't
achieved a satisfactory record by the end of the
third year after making her debut...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a good chance it will lead to her parting
ways with her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...There's no way that'll happen to us! I mean,
we've already come so far together!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. You just failed your Legendary Trainer
test.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Don't just hope. You have to say this definitely won't be the end.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Don't just hope. You have to say this definitely won't be the end.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
In my junior year, you told me that if I wanted to
become a princess, I needed to focus on getting
used to racing before entering G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
In my classic year, you continued to guide me
along even when I was lost and unsure of what to
do.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You're the person who helped me learn what it
truly means to be myself. You're my ultimate
partner!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's why I...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I want to keep running along this path together.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If we ever have to say farewell, it shouldn't be
until a long, long time from now.
choice_data_list: Then I'll become your Legendary Trainer.
Then I'll become your Legendary Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course! And I'll become your Legendary
Princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, if we want that to happen, we'd better
produce some real jaw-dropping results in these
last six months!
choice_data_list:
Why don't we start by aiming for the
Takarazuka Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, the spring Grand Prix?! The contest of
contests that brings the G1 spring season to a
close!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Roger that! I feel like the experience will be an
essential step for me as I proceed down my
princess road!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now, let's run wild!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Kawakami Princess and I decide to set
the Takarazuka Kinen as her next objective.
